response.justification: Strong general software engineer with solid production service experience and sound engineering fundamentals, but lacks the core expertise in experimentation platforms, feature flagging systems, and statistical methodology that defines this Principal role. Career demonstrates excellent technical breadth and depth in product/application systems, but not the specialized foundations work in growth and experimentation systems required for this position.
strengths: Proven production service experience at scale including millions-of-requests-per-second systems and TDD/software craftsmanship rigor
Technical versatility across multiple languages and platforms with demonstrated ability to optimize systems (pricing at Optilyz, low-latency services at Dunnhumby)
Current work on AI infrastructure and developer tooling demonstrates awareness of modern engineering practices and emerging technology
concerns: No demonstrated experience building experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, or measurement platforms—the core technical focus of this role
Limited evidence of statistical methodology, experimental design, bias detection, or rollout-risk management expertise required for growth systems
Career emphasizes product and application engineering rather than foundational platform systems and frameworks that scale across multiple teams

key_factors.factor: No experimentation platform or A/B testing framework experience
Missing statistical methodology and experimental design expertise
Strong production service experience and engineering fundamentals
